summary: Routed the six 'Every n day(s)' / 'Every nd' copy sites (HomeView add/edit task sheets and recurring badge, TodayView quick-capture, TrainView plan-session sheet and session-card badge) through plural-aware Localizable.stringsdict entries via a shared presentation helper. Added recurrence.interval.days (one/other) and recurrence.interval.compact (single form) to all 19 locale stringsdict files; non-English locales remain English placeholders per the translation-quality policy (13 plural keys total, up from 11). New Core/Application/RecurrenceIntervalPresentation.swift exposes longLabel(days:) and compactBadge(days:) and was registered in Owlory.xcodeproj. Domain models keep recurrenceIntervalDays: Int? semantic; RecurrenceRules and TrainStore/HomeStore unchanged.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-localization-recurrence-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Six hardcoded interpolated strings (`Every \(days) days`, `Every \(days)d`, `Every \(days) \(days == 1 ? "day" : "days")`) in HomeView/TodayView/TrainView. No matching keys in Localizable.strings or stringsdict, so SwiftUI fell back to the interpolated literal verbatim regardless of locale. Listed under the deferred-bucket in localization-string-inventory.md.
contract_status_changes.after: Two plural-aware keys (recurrence.interval.days one/other, recurrence.interval.compact single) in all 19 locale stringsdict files; six call sites route through Core/Application/RecurrenceIntervalPresentation.swift. localization-string-inventory.md and localization-dynamic-formatting.md updated; the recurrence-interval bucket is no longer deferred.

residual_risks: Non-English locales still render English placeholder text for the new keys; that matches the existing translation-quality policy and is gated on the reviewer-intake workflow.
The new UI strings were not exercised under the all-locale screenshot harness; the existing launch-surface screenshot pack does not drill into add-task/plan-session sheets where the new copy lives.

Switching `Stepper('Every n days', value:in:)` to `Stepper(value:in:label:)` changes the auto-generated accessibility label for the stepper. No existing XCUITest selectors target this label, but a future UI test that wants to interact with the stepper should rely on its accessibility identifier rather than the legacy literal.

The Home recurring-row compact badge now reads 'Every nd' instead of just 'nd' (visual width slightly larger). Not a regression but worth knowing for any future screenshot proof packs that captured the prior form.
recommended_next_reason: Clean stop is valid. The next dynamic-formatting candidates from the deferred bucket are readiness summaries (Train/Today) and digest insight/highlight summaries (Today); each is its own scoped slice with its own boundary. None of those are currently queued; pick one explicitly before the supervisor reopens.
